title: 私たちはデビューした

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With their debuts behind them, King Halo and
friends enjoy a lively lunch. The conversation
eventually turns to a recent magazine article
calling them the "Golden Generation."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tensions rise as they dispute which of them will
be the star of their generation. It looks like their
competition has already begun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is soon after approached by Kawakami
Princess, who has also read the recent article and
become a fervent fan as a result.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being initially caught off guard, King
Halo isn't content with just one die-hard fan. Her
talents must be celebrated throughout the world!
